item.title: Additional skills (5)
item.intent: Ship 5 skills that install cleanly, run on cron, and make their respective blueprints actually useful. A blueprint without skills is an empty promise.
item.description: BLUEPRINT COMPLETENESS: Skills are the value-add that make each blueprint useful. morning-brief is what makes 'Replace Google Assistant' actually replace Google Assistant. market-scan is why Stock Trading blueprint earns its name. Each skill is a standalone SKILL.md + prompts — thin to implement, high user impact. Acceptance: each skill installs via 'clawhq skill install'; SKILL.md + prompts present; skill runs on configured cron schedule.
steps: Verify each installs via skill lifecycle pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Each skill installs via 'clawhq skill install'
SKILL.md + prompts present for each skill
Each skill runs on its configured cron schedule
